In crisis? Call 911 for emergencies · 988 for mental health · 211 to find help · 719-633-3819 for TESSA (24-hr domestic violence)

What do you really need?

Tell us what's going on in plain English. We'll find the right help — fastest first.

Try:
About convenience scoring (●●●●● fastest help · ● longest process)
●●●●●
24/7 hotline. Pick up the phone, get a human, anytime. (911, 988, TESSA crisis line)
●●●●○
Same-day, walk-in. Daily hours, no appointment needed. (Soup kitchens, emergency shelters, ERs)
●●●○○
Same-day phone. Business hours, may direct you to next step. (Most clinics, info lines)
●●○○○
Appointment-based. Schedule needed, may be a wait. (Counseling, dental, legal aid)
●○○○○
Application required. Eligibility check, paperwork, possible weeks of processing. (LEAP, housing programs, vocational rehab)

Best matches for what you described

— resources
